title: NoAmethystGeode
description: Your world will not spawn Amethyst Geode!
body:
# **No Amethyst Geode**\
##  **没有紫水晶洞**\

If you suddenly come across a stone that doesn't match the theme of the surrounding light gray stones while digging your mine, and you find calcite and amethyst blocks, this will cause you to be very scared. If you don't want to drop to a lower version like 1.16, then install this packet :)\
It is work at Minecraft 1.21.8\
![Work at 1.21.8](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6195ab3295b7ff6cb6a5e17d4984eca22ee54503.png)\
And It can fix "Trial Chambers spawn with Amethyst Geode" Bug\
![Trial Chambers Bug Fix](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5f3465d8c9bc6e3ef503d50c4b8aa7bf81fc262f.png)
So Try It:)
You also can Install to your Minecraft Server\
You need know, We've changed the spawn chance of the Amethyst Cave from 1 in 24 to 1 in 500,000, so if you're lucky enough, you can still encounter it, it's a technical issue :)
